commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord message search to accept query/content aliases, infer a missing guildId from a session or supplied channel, normalize channel IDs, and add regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +121. Total +168 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main requires guildId before Discord search can use channel context, and the linked issue includes live logs showing ToolInputError: guildId required. I did not run a live Discord session in this read-only review.
